scopes.title: Add config/searxng symlink to bundle-secret sandbox

completedPhaseClaimDetails.evidence: Added config/searxng symlink to the bundle-secret sandbox helper in internal/deploy/bundle_secret_contract_test.go plus a doc-comment update enumerating the symlinked config inputs. Zero runtime/source/cert files touched. See BUG-052-001/report.md Code Diff Evidence.

Red-green proof: go test -run TestBundleSecretContract ./internal/deploy/... was FAIL (5 sub-tests, 'searxng settings file not found', RC=1) before the symlink and ok (56.014s, RC=0) after. See BUG-052-001/report.md Test Evidence.

go build ./... and go vet ./internal/deploy/... both clean (RC=0). Adversarial guarantees preserved - only the sandbox symlink + doc comment changed; zero assertion lines touched. See BUG-052-001/report.md Validation Evidence.

Change Boundary verified via git diff --name-only: only internal/deploy/bundle_secret_contract_test.go changed; config.sh, config/searxng/settings.yml, and spec 052 certification fields unchanged. See BUG-052-001/report.md Audit Evidence.

resolution: Symlink config/searxng into the sandbox REPO_ROOT so config.sh --bundle finds config/searxng/settings.yml (required since commit a7774fff). Restores a green internal/deploy package and unblocks code pushes.
